title: [skip-ci] Packit: re-enable CentOS Stream 10/Fedora ELN tasks
body:
We now have golang 1.23.1 in centos stream 10.

This reverts commit f47abd8e1e9f46e43acf1cd10e3ee7521bf32b31.

<!--

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Doesn't seem like centos stream 9 was updated so that still needs to be disabled

good to go. PTAL.

@martinpitt @jelly this should unblock centos stream 10 tests.
